title: Immunohistochemistry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"371fi","text":"Outlines procedures to perform immunohistochemistry on tissue that had been treated with AAV. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: All tissue should be stored in PBS prior to slicing and further processing. Remove tissue and prepare for mounting. For mouse brain, we separate each half hemisphere. Rhesus macaque brain was separated into 4 mm thick coronal blocks. For all other tissue (e.g. liver), remove a 4-5 mm piece of tissue and cut one edge to make a flat surface.

Use super glue to mount the tissue on the provided mounting disk and fill reservoir with 1X PBS. Leica VT1200 S Fully automated vibrating blade microtome (Vibratome, Leica, VT1200S, https://www.leicabiosystems.com/us/research/vibratomes/leica-vt1200-s/ )

All tissue should be stored in PBS prior to slicing and further processing. Remove tissue and incubate in 30% sucrose at 4 °C on a shaker. For marmoset tissue, incubate overnight. For rhesus macaque tissue, incubate for 72 hours, changing the 30% sucrose solution after 48 hours.

Slice tissue to 50-100 um slice and collect in 24- (mouse) or 6- (rhesus macaque) well plates filled with 1X PBS. Tissue can also be cut to 300 um to be used for index refraction matching (e.g. to perform morphological reconstructions).

Embed tissue in OCT using 100% isopropanol (or similar) chilled with dry ice. Orient tissue to ensure coronal slices. Optimal Cutting Temperature Compound (OCT) VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #361603E Peel Away Disposable Embedding Molds (Embedding mold, Electron Microscopy Sciences, 70182, https://www.emsdiasum.com/peel-away-disposable-embedding-molds ) Peel Away Disposable Embedding Molds (Embedding mold, Electron Microscopy Sciences, 70184, https://www.emsdiasum.com/peel-away-disposable-embedding-molds ) Super Mega Cassette Stainless Steel Base Molds (Embedding mold, Ted Pella Inc., 27197-2, https://www.tedpella.com/Embedding_html/Peel-A-Way_Disposable_Histology_Molds.aspx#anchor27197 ) Super Mega Cassette Stainless Steel Base Molds (Embedding mold, Ted Pella Inc., 27197-3, https://www.tedpella.com/Embedding_html/Peel-A-Way_Disposable_Histology_Molds.aspx#anchor27197 )
Store tissue at -80 °C overnight before continuing to slicing.
Cut tissue to 50 um slice and collect in 24- (marmoset) or 6- (rhesus macaque) well plates filled with 1X PBS.

Incubate slices in primary antibody overnight on a shaker at room temperature. Dilute antibody in 1X PBS supplemented with 0.1% Triton X-100 Triton X-100 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T8787-50ML and 10% normal donkey serum Normal Donkey Serum Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #017-000-121 . A B C D E 1 Antibody epitope Vendor Cat # RRID Dilution 2 GLUT1 Millipore-Sigma 07-1401 AB_1587074 1:200 3 HA Cell Signaling Technology 3724 AB_1549585 1:200 4 GFP Aves Labs GFP-1020 AB_10000240 1:500 5 NeuN Abcam ab177487 AB_2532109 1:200 6 S100 Abcam ab52642 AB_882426 1:200
Wash with PBS 3-5 times at room temperature on a shaker.

Incubate slices in secondary antibody overnight on a shaker at room temperature. Dilute antibody in 1X PBS supplemented with 0.1% Triton X-100 and 10% normal donkey serum. Protect from light to avoid photobleaching. A B C D E 1 Antibody epitope Vendor Cat # RRID Dilution 2 rabbit IgG Jackson Immunoresearch Labs 711-605-152 AB_2492288 1:200 3 chicken IgY Jackson Immunoresearch Labs 703-605-155 AB_2340379 1:200
Wash with PBS 3-5 times at room temperature on a shaker. Protect from light to avoid photobleaching.

Mount sections on slides and allow slice to dry at room temperature in the dark. Mount coverslip using Prolong Diamond Antifade. ProLong Diamond Antifade Mountant Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #P36970
creator: Miguel Chuapoco
